scripts.build:all: npm run build:dotnet && npm run build:npm
scripts.test:all: npm run test:dotnet && npm run test:npm
scripts.refresh:showcase-ui: npm run build:npm && npm run install:showcase-ui && npm run sync:showcase-deps && npm run clear:showcase-ui-cache
scripts.prepare:showcase-ui: npm run build:npm && npm run install:showcase-ui && npm run sync:showcase-deps && npm run clear:showcase-ui-cache
scripts.dev:showcase-ui: npm run prepare:showcase-ui && concurrently -k -n core,primeng,sync,ui "npm run watch:core --prefix src/npm" "npm run watch:primeng --prefix src/npm" "npm run watch:sync-showcase-deps" "npm run start --prefix samples/showcase-ui"
